title: BEM-674 Russian compact report
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

renderer=scripts/'render_curator_hourly_report.py'
renderer.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'KYIV = timezone(timedelta(hours=3))',
'OUT = Path("governance/tmp/curator_hourly_report_message.txt")',
'STATE = Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md")',
'def load_json(path):',
'    if not path.exists():',
'        return {}',
'    try:',
'        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))',
'    except:',
'        return {}',
'def mark(ok, pending=False):',
'    if ok:',
'        return "✅"',
'    if pending:',
'        return "⚠️"',
'    return "❌"',
'def cut(text, width):',
'    text = str(text)',
'    if len(text) <= width:',
'        return text.ljust(width)',
'    return text[:max(0, width-1)] + "…"',
'def row(n, name, essence, status):',
'    return f"{str(n).rjust(1)} | {cut(name, 12)} | {cut(essence, 16)} | {status}"',
'now = datetime.now(KYIV)',
'report_hour = now.replace(minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)',
'contour = load_json(Path("governance/state/contour_status.json"))',
'smoke = load_json(Path("governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json"))',
'hourly = load_json(Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json"))',
'final = load_json(Path("governance/state/bem668_final_readiness_or_exact_blocker.json"))',
'write_smoke = load_json(Path("governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json"))',
'lint = load_json(Path("governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json"))',
'provider = load_json(Path("governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json"))',
'write_ok = write_smoke.get("status") == "pass" or contour.get("codex_runner_write_channel_status") == "restored"',
'lint_ok = lint.get("status") == "pass" or contour.get("internal_contour_architecture_status") == "closed"',
'provider_ok = provider.get("architecture_closed") is True or contour.get("internal_contour_architecture_status") == "closed"',
'smoke_ok = smoke.get("delivery_confirmed") is True',
'hourly_ok = hourly.get("telegram_delivery") == "sent"',
'final_ok = final.get("status") == "production_ready"',
'rows = [',
'    (1, "Канал", "восстановлен", mark(write_ok, True)),',
'    (2, "Роли", "проверены", mark(lint_ok, True)),',
'    (3, "Провайдер", "маршрут ясен", mark(provider_ok, True)),',
'    (4, "ТГ-тест", "отправка есть", mark(smoke_ok, True)),',
'    (5, "Часовой", "доставка есть", mark(hourly_ok, True)),',
'    (6, "Готовность", "принята", mark(final_ok, True)),',
']',
'done = sum(1 for r in rows if r[3] == "✅")',
'total = len(rows)',
'percent = round(done * 100 / total)',
'lines=[]',
'lines.append("BEM-HOURLY | ЧАСОВОЙ ОТЧЁТ")',
'lines.append("Дата: " + report_hour.strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:00 (UTC+3)"))',
'lines.append("")',
'lines.append(f"Этап: {done}/{total} ({percent}%)")',
'lines.append(f"Дорожная карта: {done}/{total} ({percent}%)")',
'lines.append("")',
'lines.append("```")',
'lines.append("№ | Наименование | Краткая суть     | Ст")',
'lines.append("--+--------------+------------------+---")',
'for r in rows:',
'    lines.append(row(*r))',
'lines.append("```")',
'message = SEP.join(lines) + SEP',
'OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'OUT.write_text(message, encoding="utf-8")',
'STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'state={"schema_version":"curator_hourly_report_state.v3_ru_compact","status":"rendered","report_hour":report_hour.strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:00 (UTC+3)"),"stage_done":done,"stage_total":total,"stage_percent":percent,"roadmap_done":done,"roadmap_total":total,"roadmap_percent":percent,"telegram_delivery":"pending_send","language":"ru","layout":"compact_table","rows":[{"number":r[0],"name":r[1],"essence":r[2],"status":r[3]} for r in rows],"blocker":None}',
'STATE.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'REPORT.write_text("# Curator Hourly Report Runtime" + SEP + SEP + message, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps({"status":"rendered","hour":state["report_hour"],"done":done,"total":total,"layout":"ru_compact"}, ensure_ascii=False))'
])+sep)

protocol=protocols/'OPERATOR_TELEGRAM_REPORT_CANON.md'
old=protocol.read_text(errors='ignore') if protocol.exists() else ''
protocol.write_text('# BEM-674 | Канон Telegram-отчёта оператору'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 19:03 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Часовой отчёт'+sep+'Язык: русский. Состав: заголовок, дата/час, процент этапа, процент дорожной карты, компактная таблица.'+sep+sep+'Колонки таблицы: `№`, `Наименование`, `Краткая суть`, `Ст`. Ширина колонок сокращена для мобильного Telegram: наименование до 12 символов, суть до 16 символов.'+sep+sep+'Запрещено в операторском отчёте: английские статусы, raw trace-id, длинные списки событий, широкие колонки.'+sep+sep+'## Сообщение согласования'+sep+'В шапке краткий вопрос и дата/время. Таблица: `№`, `Наименование варианта`, `Обоснование`.'+sep)

# Queue only hourly report once.
q=queue/'curator_hourly_report_ru_compact_once.json'
q.write_text(json.dumps({'workflow':'curator-hourly-report.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger').write_text('BEM-674 trigger Russian compact hourly report 2026-05-18 | 19:03 (UTC+3)'+sep)

text=renderer.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'renderer_exists','pass':renderer.exists(),'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'russian_title','pass':'ЧАСОВОЙ ОТЧЁТ' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'no_english_row_labels','pass':'Write-channel' not in text and 'Role-bus' not in text and 'Readiness' not in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'compact_widths','pass':'cut(name, 12)' in text and 'cut(essence, 16)' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'queue_only_hourly','pass':q.exists(),'evidence':str(q)},
 {'name':'canon_updated','pass':protocol.exists() and 'Язык: русский' in protocol.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(protocol)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'RU_COMPACT_HOURLY_PATCH_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'russian_compact_hourly_report.v1','bem':'BEM-674','status':status,'checks':checks,'renderer':str(renderer),'queue_file':str(q),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:03 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem674_russian_compact_hourly_report.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem674_russian_compact_hourly_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-674 | Russian Compact Hourly Report | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 19:03 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem674_russian_compact_hourly_report','cycle_id':'bem674-russian-compact-hourly-report','source':'executor','status':status,'queue_file':str(q),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:03 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem674_russian_compact_hourly_report']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'queue_file':str(q),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['operator_telegram_report_format']='ru_compact_table_v3'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 19:03 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem674_russian_compact_hourly_report.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-674 '+status.upper()+': Russian compact hourly report renderer installed and queued.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(renderer),str(protocol),str(q),str(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Updated hourly report renderer to Russian compact mobile table with shorter columns and queued only curator hourly report')
"""
No issue comments.
